breaking_news_suggestions.headline: The refraction fix that was supposed to save the dome erases its entire map
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: New Section 1.8 shows that the dome model's fix for the sun/firmament collision — invoking an aetheric refractive medium — invalidates every coordinate and distance calculation the model makes. The same medium that bends sunlight also bends Polaris light, introducing 21-44% position errors across the disc. The dome's aetheric scaling law is secretly doing spherical geometry.
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: Core new argument that cascades across 25+ WINs. Stronger than the Refraction Cascade table it replaces — now has quantitative ray-trace evidence.
